scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run deploy:prod && node commit-deploy-stamp.js && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run deploy:prod && node commit-deploy-stamp.js && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run deploy:prod && node commit-deploy-stamp.js && git push --follow-tags
scripts.test:playwright:blank-doc: npx playwright test tests/playwright/sidebar_shell.test.js -g "brand-new blank doc" --config tests/playwright/playwright.config.js --retries=0
